description_long: This bungalow is a detached residential building with a light gray gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a well-maintained yard with green lawns, shrubs, and mature trees. The front features a driveway leading to a single-car garage, and the main entrance is set back from the street. The rear of the property includes a fenced backyard with a visible swimming pool and patio area, providing outdoor leisure space. The structure has two above-ground stories, with the upper floor set back and partially integrated into the roofline, giving a compact yet spacious appearance. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of single and grouped panes on all sides, and the property is bordered by a wooden fence for privacy. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A two-story light gray bungalow with a gable roof, white walls, garage, fenced yard, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, fenced yard, and backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, and patio, with upper story windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the front lawn, trees, and the side of the garage and house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows on all sides
